text:
認められたアークスしか行けない
浮遊大陸。アンタも知ってのとおり
ここのやつらは手強いわよ！

無理しなくてもいいからね。
もちろん、ダメだったら
「へっぽこぴー」に逆戻りだけど。

いや、この一回で逆戻りも
ちょっとかわいそう……かな？
なんにせよ、頑張りなさい

The Floating Continent: a place where only the
elite of the elite can venture. The enemies
there are tough stuff, as you already know.

You don't have to stick your neck out too far
on this one. Of course, if you DO back out,
I'm demoting you back to clown status.

Then again, maybe one wuss-out isn't
enough to justify that harsh of a punishment...
Meh, I dunno. Anyway, go get 'em!
